productDisplayName: Scholl Men Massagio Black Formal Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these shoes from scholl are made for you. The slip-on design of these shoes makes it a great wardrobe staple.Team these with jeans or chinos and tees for a cool look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Rounded toe box for greater comfort Elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for greater comfort Lightly padded collar for greater comfort Midsole Contoured heel cup for heel support Arch support with ribs to provide gentle massage Ribbed footbed massages feet and stimulates circulation EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Outsole that has a shock dot in the centre of the heel for shock absorption Mutli-directional textured grooves for better grip Heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
